title: Marketplace Manager - BlinkIt - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - BlinkIt - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Join the BlinkIt family as a Marketplace Manager in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BlinkIt:
BlinkIt is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlinkIt!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
